verses.1: A Song. A Psalm of the sons of Korah. For the music director; according to Mahalath Leannoth. A Maskil of Heman the Ezrahite. LORD, the God of my salvation, I have cried out by day and in the night before You.
verses.2: Let my prayer come before You; Incline Your ear to my cry!
verses.3: For my soul has had enough troubles, And my life has approached Sheol.
verses.4: I am counted among those who go down to the pit; I have become like a man without strength,
verses.5: Abandoned among the dead, Like the slain who lie in the grave, Whom You no longer remember, And they are cut off from Your hand.
verses.6: You have put me in the lowest pit, In dark places, in the depths.
verses.7: Your wrath has rested upon me, And You have afflicted me with all Your waves. Selah
verses.8: You have removed my acquaintances far from me; You have made me an object of loathing to them; I am shut up and cannot go out.
verses.9: My eye grows dim from misery; I have called upon You every day, LORD; I have spread out my hands to You.
verses.10: Will You perform wonders for the dead? Or will the departed spirits rise and praise You? Selah
verses.11: Will Your graciousness be declared in the grave, Your faithfulness in Abaddon?
verses.12: Will Your wonders be made known in the darkness? And Your righteousness in the land of forgetfulness?
verses.13: But I, LORD, have cried out to You for help, And in the morning my prayer comes before You.
verses.14: LORD, why do You reject my soul? Why do You hide Your face from me?
verses.15: I was miserable and about to die from my youth on; I suffer Your terrors; I grow weary.
verses.16: Your burning anger has passed over me; Your terrors have destroyed me.
verses.17: They have surrounded me like water all day long; They have encircled me altogether.
verses.18: You have removed lover and friend far from me; My acquaintances are in a hiding place.
